notes: Source: IRremoteESP8266 ir_Samsung.h/.cpp — covers Samsung AR/DB AR09FSSDAWKNFA, AR09HSFSBWKN, AR12HSSDBWKNEU, AR12KSFPEWQNET, AR12NXCXAWKXEU, AR12TXEAAWKNEU, DB93-14195A, DB96-24901C.
Protocol: SAMSUNG_AC (stateful 14-byte / 112-bit). Each command encodes the full target state.
Stored as raw timing arrays because firmware has no named SAMSUNG_AC encoder; raw fallback works.
Default for mode_*/temp_*/fan_*/swing_v_* commands: COOL + 24°C + fan auto + swing off + sleep off.
power_on / power_off send the STANDARD 14-byte message (no extra extended on/off prefix).
If your unit needs the extended power prefix to actually toggle, capture via the learn flow.
Coverage: power on/off, 5 modes, 15 temps (16-30°C), 5 fan speeds, swing v on/off, sleep.
Carrier: 38 kHz. Frame timings: hdr 690/17844us, section 3086/8864us, bit 586us, one 1432us, zero 436us, section gap 2886us.
